faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer:
The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

placements.overview:
Established in 2022, Shubham University is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 42 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Shubham University is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fee structure for the Shubham University programmes is around INR 24,000 to 2,40,000.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college and is one of the best colleges in this region.
reviews.review_text: The study atmosphere on campus is good. Labs are well-equipped. Hostels are provided for both boys and girls. Cricket, volleyball and basketball grounds and courts are available on the campus. The library is excellent. The campus is spread over 25 acres. Tables are provided all over the campus. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion, the college is good with no fee structure.
reviews.review_text: A library and hostel are available on the campus. The campus is free from pollution and ragging. Vision, drinking water, experienced faculty, transport availability, laboratories, gym, and sports and games, facilities are available in the college. Cultural events are conducted. The campus is under CCTV surveillance. Special classes are taken for weak candidates. A computer lab is available. Communication improvement programmes are conducted. Medical facilities are available. Spiritual speeches, ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avanthi's St.Theressa Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities. There are well-equipped labs and computer labs. Cultural activities and technical fests are conducted here. The college offers a healthy atmosphere. The quality of the food served is good, and they encourage sports and other talents who are interested in other activities like singing, dancing drums, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would say the education is not good, but the sports activities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. I am dissatisfied with few things in the college. The computer labs are not enough; we have to share the computer systems. I have the worst experience with the canteen, high-quality food and purified water are not available. The hostel is okay according to my experience.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is nice and good facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are nice. The labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, sports and games are very well. The classrooms and labs are more and has much space. The canteen food is not really good. The hostel rooms are depended upon our neatness. I didn't face any infrastructure issues in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average to good college.
reviews.review_text: College administration and infrastructure is good and labs of electronics and communication engineering is so good. I don't know about other branch labs. Play ground of college is good and bus facility is available for up to Visakhapatnam, srikakulam and Vijaya again.

reviews.review_heading: Fully disappointed of joining this college. Waste of life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are there, but faculty are not good. The library is also not up to the mark. Labs were not conducted regularly. At the exam time, they will conduct small practicals and send us for exams. It is a very bad college. Don't spoil anyone's life, joining in that college.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Avanthi's St.Theressa Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. At my time it had three buildings. The laboratories are also available. There isn't much infrastructure available for the mechanical department. The rest of the departments were good at my time. The principal strictly follows the college's in-time and out-time. The infrastructure is good overall.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are average, but overall the college is good. I would recommend taking admission here.

content.Placements: As far as I know, the placement record is quite good. Around 70-80% of students get placed every year. Companies like TCS, HCL, Wipro, Motherson, and Policybazaar visit the campus. Placements are the best thing this college offers so far, and it's the best thing that colleges often do during their placement drive.
content.Infrastructure: Management building of my course is really good and unique. Every classroom is really big and spacious and is very great. The food of the canteen is value for money and tastes even better. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Gym and park are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent college for BBA with good placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included HDFC Bank, ICICI Prudential, and Byjus. Approximately 60% of the students secured internships in companies like Decathlon and HDFC Bank.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus offers decent infrastructure. Classrooms are well-lit and equipped with projectors. Wi-Fi is available. Library is well-stocked with academic and reference books. Labs (for IT-related subjects) are functional. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are decent but the washrooms can be cleaner.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sunder Deep Group of Institution.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in my course. The highest package in my course is 7.5 LPA. The lowest in my course is 80,000. Top recruiting companies in my course are Wipro and TCS. The percentage of students who got internships is 75% in my course at companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained. Teachers are very helpful in any situation. Classrooms and the library of the college are very good and well-maintained. I am not a hosteller, so I don't know about the hostel. The food items are very good and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. The infrastructure attracts people and students towards it.

content.Placements: I have done B.Com from SDGI. There are almost 60-70% placements. The highest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 2-2.5 LPA. Some top recruiting companies like Genpact, Wipro, and Bajaj visit the college to hire students. About 80-90% of students got an internship in college in Bajaj and banks. Sales and marketing roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure, a library as well as labs. There is a Wi-Fi issue. The hostel was good and a mess provided medium quality food. There is a big ground for sports and games. The college provides students to play games and tournaments to maintain their health good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with my college because of its great education and best infrastructure.

content.Placements: In my course, up to 70-80% of students are placed in various companies. The highest package occupied by a student in 2023 is 8 LPA, while the lowest recorded package is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: The college has wonderful infrastructure with all the required equipment for our education. We have a well-equipped library that is fully air-conditioned, and reading materials are easily accessible for everyone. The canteen facilities are also very good.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in our college. The highest package is 60 LPA, and the lowest package is 30 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Flipkart, IBM, Google, and Infosys. 100% of students have been provided with internships by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has full Wi-Fi across the campus. The labs are well-equipped, and we have large classrooms with a friendly atmosphere. There is a big library full of knowledge. The hostel creates a homely nature and is clean. The facilities are well and good, and the mess food is very nice.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I pursuing my B.Tech in computer science and engineering from the batch 2028. The placements scenario for our batch is quite promising, with around 87 percent of the students successfully placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package offered is 35 LPA, the lowest package is 14 LPA and the average package is 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer science and engineering department is equipped with modern facilities to enhance both learning and research experiences. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and fitted with projectors and smart boards to support interactive teaching. The central library is another strong asset, stocked with a vast collection of academic books, journals, and digital resources. Medical facilities on campus include a health center with a first aid kit, basic checkups, and emergency response support, and ambulance available.

paragraphs: Kopal Institute of Management Studies admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Kopal Institute of Management Studies. The college offers programmes in Business and Management Studies streams.
The college offers PG courses for 2 years.

The total fee ofKopal Institute of Management Studiesincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.
